title: IISER Pune – Computer Lab Assistant and Office Assistant – 2 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Computer Lab Assistant and Office Assistant (Multi-skilled). Candidates with M.Sc / M. Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IISER Pune official website iiserpune.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Computer Lab Assistant and Office Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Computer Lab Assistant and Office Assistant (Multi-skilled). Candidates with M.Sc / M. Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IISER Pune official website iiserpune.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc / M. Tech in Mathematics / Physics / Computer Science or related fields with at least 55% marks or equivalent grades, Bachelor's degree in any discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent grades with excellent proficiency in office applications such as MS Word, Excel and PowerPoint

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IISER Pune Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
